title: Crispy Smashed Potato Chicken Salad

steps.text: Cook the baby potatoes until fork-tender (microwave or boil), then lightly smash each one flat.
steps.text_su: Masak kentang baby ngasi empuk (microwave utowo digodhok), terus gepuk siji-siji ngasi ceper.

steps.text: Spray the smashed potatoes with oil, season with salt, pepper, garlic powder and smoked paprika, and roast in a hot oven or air-fryer until golden and crispy.
steps.text_su: Semprot kentang gepuk nganggo lengo, bumboni uyah, mrico, bubuk bawang putih, ambek paprika asap, terus panggang nang oven panas utowo air fryer ngasi kuning garing.

steps.text: Season the chicken breast with the same spices, cook it through (pan or air-fryer), then dice.
steps.text_su: Bumboni dada pitik nganggo bumbu sing podo, masak ngasi mateng (kuali utowo air fryer), terus iris dadu.

steps.text: Make the sauce: mix the Greek yoghurt, light mayo, Dijon mustard, chopped pickles, pickle juice, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt and pepper.
steps.text_su: Gawe saus: campur yogurt Yunani, mayo light, mustard Dijon, acar timun sing dicacah, banyu acar, banyu jeruk lemon, bubuk bawang putih, uyah, ambek mrico.

steps.text: In a bowl, combine the crispy potatoes, chicken, cucumber, red onion and spring onion, then fold through the sauce.
steps.text_su: Nang mangkok, campur kentang garing, pitik, timun, bawang abang, ambek godhong bawang, terus aduk karo sause.

steps.text: Top with extra chives and a pinch of smoked paprika. Serves 2 — about 483 cal and 44g protein each.
steps.text_su: Taburi godhong kucai ambek sak jumput paprika asap. Dadi 2 porsi — kiro-kiro 483 kalori ambek 44g protein saben porsi.

notes: Ingredients and macros are from the creator's caption; the method is reconstructed from the dish, since the caption lists the ingredients without step timings. Cook the potatoes until tender before smashing and crisping. Serves 2 — ~483 cal / 44g protein each.
notes_su: Bahan ambek makro teko caption sing nggawe; carane direkonstruksi teko dhise amergo caption mung nyebutno bahan tanpa langkah rinci. Masak kentange ngasi empuk sakdurunge digepuk lan digarangno. Dadi 2 porsi — ~483 kalori / 44g protein saben porsi.
